name: asiai
description: Apple Silicon LLM inference benchmark and monitoring agent. Exposes 11 read-only tools and 3 resources over the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to detect installed inference engines, benchmark local models, and recommend configurations by hardware. Runs locally (stdio) or over SSE/streamable-HTTP.

supportedInterfaces.description: MCP server over stdio — invoke via `asiai mcp`
MCP server over Server-Sent Events — invoke via `asiai mcp --transport sse`
MCP server over streamable HTTP — invoke via `asiai mcp --transport streamable-http`

skills.name: Check Inference Health
skills.description: Quick health check of all local LLM inference engines. Returns ok/degraded/error, memory pressure, thermal state, GPU. Responds in <500ms.
examples: Is local LLM inference available right now?

skills.name: List Loaded Models
skills.description: List all models currently loaded across inference engines (VRAM, quantization, context length).
examples: What models are loaded right now?

skills.name: Detect Inference Engines
skills.description: Auto-detect running LLM inference engines (Ollama, LM Studio, mlx-lm, llama.cpp, vLLM-MLX, Exo, TurboQuant).
examples: Which inference engines are installed on this Mac?

skills.name: Run Inference Benchmark
skills.description: Benchmark a local model's performance (tok/s, TTFT, VRAM, power) with statistical rigour (CI 95%, P50/P90/P99). Supports multi-engine and cross-model comparison.
examples: Compare Qwen 3.5 vs 3.6 on this Mac

skills.name: Recommend Engine and Model
skills.description: Hardware-aware engine+model recommendations optimized for throughput, latency, or power efficiency.
examples: What's the fastest engine for my Mac?

skills.name: Compare Engines
skills.description: Side-by-side comparison of inference engines or models from benchmark history.
examples: Compare Ollama MLX vs LM Studio for Qwen 3.6

skills.name: Full Inference Snapshot
skills.description: Complete system + inference state: CPU load, memory, thermal, GPU, engines status, loaded models, recent activity.
examples: Give me a full status report of local inference

skills.name: Run Diagnostics
skills.description: Comprehensive diagnostic checks: Apple Silicon compat, engines health, DB integrity, daemon status, alerting config.
